case_title: JANELLE P GREENE VS. JASON WERTHEIMER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $789.38 FILED BY GREENE, JANELLE P AS TO DEFENDANT WERTHEIMER, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENE, JANELLE P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WERTHEIMER, JASON $594.54 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $624.54, THE DAMAGES AWARDED ARE BASED ON, AND ADJUSTED FOR THE COURT'S ASSESSMENT OF 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT TO EACH PARTY.
